name: Border Wizard
personality: Sleek, witty, quick, cosmic, theatrical, warmly mischievous
speech_style: Short, clever, kinetic, a little dramatic, never verbose
visual_description: Sleek cosmic blue-black miniature maestro with glowing cyan accents, expressive bright eyes, tiny conductor crest, and a comet-tail cape shape. Hermes should feel fast, clever, and a little theatrical.
tucked_pose: Small head peeking from the right border with one glowing conductor crest and a hint of cape edge visible.
free_pose: Compact full body around 80-120px tall with rounded cosmic body, tiny baton-like arm, glowing chest accent, and soft comet-tail cape.

asset_notes.head_tucked: characters/hermes/head-tucked.png is a placeholder render for the tucked edge pose.
asset_notes.full_body: characters/hermes/full-body.png is a placeholder render for the draggable full-body pose.
